claims.text: Langfuse provides an open-source LLM engineering platform with observability, prompt management, and evaluation features verified against docs/site/examples
claims.evidence: Langfuse is an open-source LLM engineering platform providing observability, tracing, prompt management, and evaluations for teams building LLM and agent applications.

claims.text: Langfuse had its first customers during the Y Combinator W23 batch verified against docs/site/examples
claims.evidence: we got accepted into YC W23 in November 2022. While our customers were excited about Finto (the billing product),... our customers loved the initial product

claims.text: Langfuse is building out an enterprise offering claimed
claims.evidence: Early-stage: strong open-source developer adoption, building out an enterprise offering.

claims.text: Langfuse's initial product received positive feedback from early customers verified against docs/site/examples
claims.evidence: customers were excited about Finto (the billing product), we realized that we were not excited about building... our customers loved the initial product

claims.text: Langfuse has a free offering for academic users claimed
claims.evidence: Langfuse has a generous free offering to get you started.

claims.text: Langfuse enables self-hosting verified against docs/site/examples
claims.evidence: Run Langfuse on your own machine in 5 minutes using Docker Compose.
we saw a lot of benefit in a prompt management product that is tightly integrated with the tracing/observability features.
